description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for testing DeFiCh/go-ethlibs that runs on push to master, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should have concurrent execution with cancel-in-progress for non-master refs. It should set up an ubuntu-latest environment with specific variables, then run a series of make scripts to export vars, setup dependencies, and build binaries. The workflow should upload the binaries and shell commands as artifacts. Additionally, it should run node-rpc-tests that download the artifacts, set up permissions, and run Go tests for EVM RPC.
